targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Rides" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(SUM(distance_m), 0) / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Distance" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(elevation_m), 0)::numeric, 0) AS "Elevation" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration_s), 0) AS "Duration" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(calories), 0) AS "Calories" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND calories IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(tss), 0)::numeric, 0) AS "TSS" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date);
SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_power)::numeric, 0) AS "Power" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_power > 0;
SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) AS "Speed" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000;
SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_hr)::numeric, 0) AS "HR" FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_hr > 0;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.distance_m) / 1000.0, 0) AS "Outdoor (km)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.distance_m) / 1000.0, 0) AS "Zwift (km)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.distance_m) / 1000.0, 0) AS "E-Bike (km)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.distance_m) / 1000.0, 0) AS "Indoor (km)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.elevation_m), 0) AS "Outdoor (m)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.elevation_m), 0) AS "Zwift (m)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.elevation_m), 0) AS "E-Bike (m)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.elevation_m), 0) AS "Indoor (m)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor' GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.duration_s / 3600.0), 0) AS "Outdoor (h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor'  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.duration_s / 3600.0), 0) AS "Zwift (h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift'  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.duration_s / 3600.0), 0) AS "E-Bike (h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike'  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.duration_s / 3600.0), 0) AS "Indoor (h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor'  GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.calories), 0) AS "Outdoor (kcal)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor' AND a.calories IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.calories), 0) AS "Zwift (kcal)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift' AND a.calories IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.calories), 0) AS "E-Bike (kcal)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike' AND a.calories IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.calories), 0) AS "Indoor (kcal)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor' AND a.calories IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_power)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Outdoor (W)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor' AND a.avg_power > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_power)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Zwift (W)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift' AND a.avg_power > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_power)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "E-Bike (W)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike' AND a.avg_power > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_power)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Indoor (W)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor' AND a.avg_power > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1), 0) AS "Outdoor (km/h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor' AND a.avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND a.distance_m > 5000 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1), 0) AS "Zwift (km/h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift' AND a.avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND a.distance_m > 5000 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1), 0) AS "E-Bike (km/h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike' AND a.avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND a.distance_m > 5000 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1), 0) AS "Indoor (km/h)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor' AND a.avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND a.distance_m > 5000 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_hr)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Outdoor (bpm)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor' AND a.avg_hr > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_hr)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Zwift (bpm)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift' AND a.avg_hr > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_hr)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "E-Bike (bpm)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike' AND a.avg_hr > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.avg_hr)::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Indoor (bpm)" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor' AND a.avg_hr > 0 GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.tss), 0) AS "Outdoor" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_outdoor' AND a.tss IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.tss), 0) AS "Zwift" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'zwift' AND a.tss IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.tss), 0) AS "E-Bike" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'ebike' AND a.tss IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;

SELECT gs AS "time", COALESCE(SUM(a.tss), 0) AS "Indoor" FROM generate_series(date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz), date_trunc('${group_by}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz), '1 ${group_by}'::interval) gs LEFT JOIN activities a ON date_trunc('${group_by}', a.date) = gs AND a.sport_type = 'cycling_indoor' AND a.tss IS NOT NULL GROUP BY gs ORDER BY gs;
SELECT ROUND(ctl::numeric, 1) AS "CTL" FROM athlete_stats ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT ROUND(atl::numeric, 1) AS "ATL" FROM athlete_stats ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT ROUND(tsb::numeric, 1) AS "TSB" FROM athlete_stats ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;

WITH best20 AS (SELECT ROUND(MAX(avg_20min) * 0.95) AS ftp FROM (SELECT AVG(s.power) OVER (PARTITION BY s.activity_id ORDER BY s.time_offset RANGE BETWEEN 1199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_20min FROM activity_streams s JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id WHERE a.date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '90 days' AND s.power IS NOT NULL AND s.power > 0) sub WHERE avg_20min IS NOT NULL) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ftp FROM best20 WHERE ftp > 0), (SELECT ROUND(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY avg_power)::numeric, 0) FROM activities WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0)) AS "FTP";
SELECT date AS "time", ctl AS "Fitness (CTL)", atl AS "Fatigue (ATL)", tsb AS "Form (TSB)" FROM athlete_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date;

SELECT m.* FROM (
SELECT 1 AS ord, 'Longest Ride' AS "Metric",
  CASE WHEN ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km' WHEN ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km' ELSE ROUND(MAX(distance_m/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km' END AS "Period Best",
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((MAX(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE) AS "Previous Period",
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((MAX(distance_m)/1000.0)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE) AS "All Time"
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND distance_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Most Elevation',
  CASE WHEN ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(elevation_m)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m' WHEN ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(elevation_m)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m' ELSE ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(elevation_m)::numeric, 0)::text || ' m', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND elevation_m > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'Longest Duration',
  CASE WHEN MAX(duration_s) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(duration_s) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(duration_s) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI') WHEN MAX(duration_s) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(duration_s) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI') ELSE TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI') END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI'), 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(TO_CHAR(MAX(duration_s) * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI'), 'No data') FROM activities WHERE duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND duration_s > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Most Calories',
  CASE WHEN MAX(calories) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(calories) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(calories) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal' WHEN MAX(calories) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(calories) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal' ELSE MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(calories)::text || ' kcal', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND calories > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'Highest Avg Power',
  CASE WHEN MAX(avg_power) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(avg_power) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_power) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W' WHEN MAX(avg_power) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_power) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W' ELSE MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_power)::text || ' W', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_power > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'Highest Avg Speed',
  CASE WHEN ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h' WHEN ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h' ELSE ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(MAX(avg_speed_kmh)::numeric, 1)::text || ' km/h', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'Highest Avg HR',
  CASE WHEN MAX(avg_hr) IS NULL THEN 'No data' WHEN MAX(avg_hr) > COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_hr) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▲ ' || MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm' WHEN MAX(avg_hr) < COALESCE((SELECT MAX(avg_hr) FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE), 0) THEN '▼ ' || MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm' ELSE MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm' END,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE),
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(avg_hr)::text || ' bpm', 'No data') FROM activities WHERE avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE)
  FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_hr > 0 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE
) m ORDER BY m.ord;

SELECT s.lat AS "latitude", s.lng AS "longitude", a.date AS "time" FROM activity_streams s JOIN activities a ON a.id = s.activity_id WHERE s.lat IS NOT NULL AND s.lng IS NOT NULL AND a.is_indoor IS NOT TRUE AND s.time_offset % 10 = 0 ORDER BY a.date, s.time_offset LIMIT 500000;
SELECT date::date AS "time", ROUND(avg_speed_kmh::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Speed (km/h)" FROM activities WHERE avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000 AND is_indoor IS NOT TRUE ORDER BY date;
SELECT date::date AS "time", ROUND((avg_power * 1.05)::numeric, 0) AS "Est 20min Power (W)" FROM activities WHERE avg_power IS NOT NULL AND avg_power > 0 AND duration_s > 1200 ORDER BY date;
SELECT date::date AS "time", ROUND((SUM(distance_m) OVER (ORDER BY date) / 1000.0)::numeric, 0) AS "Total (km)" FROM activities WHERE distance_m > 0 ORDER BY date;

SELECT id, name AS "Name", TO_CHAR(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Date", ROUND((distance_m / 1000.0)::numeric, 1) AS "Dist (km)", ROUND(elevation_m::numeric, 0) AS "Elev (m)", TO_CHAR(duration_s * interval '1 second', 'HH24:MI') AS "Duration", ROUND(avg_speed_kmh::numeric, 1) AS "Speed", avg_hr AS "HR", avg_power AS "Power", avg_cadence AS "Cadence", calories AS "Calories", ROUND(tss::numeric, 0) AS "TSS", EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM date - interval '1 hour')::bigint * 1000 AS from_ts, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM date + duration_s * interval '1 second' + interval '1 hour')::bigint * 1000 AS to_ts FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) ORDER BY date DESC;

SELECT (COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::int AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)) curr, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) prev;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT SUM(distance_m)/1000.0 AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)) curr, (SELECT SUM(distance_m)/1000.0 AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) prev;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT SUM(elevation_m) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)) curr, (SELECT SUM(elevation_m) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) prev;

SELECT (COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0)) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT SUM(duration_s) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)) curr, (SELECT SUM(duration_s) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) prev;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT SUM(calories) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND calories IS NOT NULL) curr, (SELECT SUM(calories) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND calories IS NOT NULL) prev;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT SUM(tss) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date)) curr, (SELECT SUM(tss) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) prev;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT AVG(avg_power) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_power > 0) curr, (SELECT AVG(avg_power) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_power > 0) prev;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::numeric, 1) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT AVG(avg_speed_kmh) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000) curr, (SELECT AVG(avg_speed_kmh) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_speed_kmh > 0 AND distance_m > 5000) prev;

SELECT ROUND((COALESCE(curr.v, 0) - COALESCE(prev.v, 0))::numeric, 0) AS "Delta" FROM (SELECT AVG(avg_hr) AS v FROM activities WHERE $__timeFilter(date) AND avg_hr > 0) curr, (SELECT AVG(avg_hr) AS v FROM activities WHERE date >= $__timeFrom()::timestamptz - ($__timeTo()::timestamptz - $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AND date < $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND avg_hr > 0) prev;
